title: 论文提炼｜Select Edges Wisely: Monotonic Path Aware Graph Layout Optimization for Disk-Based ANN Search
content:
论文名称：Select Edges Wisely: Monotonic Path Aware Graph Layout Optimization for Disk-Based ANN Search
研究主题：大模型推理、检索增强与记忆系统
发表 venue：SIGMOD - International Conference on Management of Data
发表年份：2026
作者：Ziyang Yue, Bolong Zheng, Ling Xu, Kanru Xu, Shuhao Zhang, Yajuan Du, Yunjun Gao, Xiaofang Zhou, Christian S. Jensen
作者角色：合作作者或共同作者
一句话总结：Approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) search is a critical primitive in modern retrieval systems, but disk-based graph indexes often suffer from poor locality and inefficient layout optimization.
核心内容：
Approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) search is a critical primitive in modern retrieval systems, but disk-based graph indexes often suffer from poor locality and inefficient layout optimization. This work proposes MARGO, a monotonic path-aware graph layout optimization method for disk-based ANN search. It formalizes graph layout quality through an objective that emphasizes edges important to monotonic paths, introduces a greedy optimization strategy to preserve more effective search paths, and further improves efficiency with a two-stage decoupling design. The resulting method improves locality and search efficiency for disk-resident ANN indexes under memory-constrained settings.
适合回答的问题：
- 这篇论文主要解决什么问题，以及它为什么重要。
- 这篇论文的核心方法、系统设计或算法思路是什么。
- 这篇论文与 大模型推理、检索增强与记忆系统 这条研究主线的关系是什么。
